seoTitle: Top Springs vs Tumbling Waters — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Top Springs and Tumbling Waters. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Top Springs vs Tumbling Waters: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Top Springs and Tumbling Waters.
heading: Top Springs vs Tumbling Waters — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Top Springs, Northern Territory and Tumbling Waters, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tumbling Waters has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Top Springs (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Top Springs or Tumbling Waters safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Top Springs has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Tumbling Waters scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Top Springs scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Tumbling Waters scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Top Springs or Tumbling Waters?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tumbling Waters has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
